text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm heading toward the school gates
after school...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...One more minute until the scheduled time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If I wait around for Falcon any longer, I might not
make it to Oi Racecourse on time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If everything is to proceed without delay,
punctuality is essential. No matter the
circumstances, schedules must be respected...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm-hm-hmm! ♪ I can't wait for tonight's
performance! ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Falcon. Perfect timing. I've got a question to
ask you.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
What? A question for meee? All right! My
measurements are— ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That is unnecessary. Are you well acquainted with
Oi Racecourse?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to watch the eleventh race today. I plan
to leave the academy at 6:00 p.m. What is the
shortest route from the stat—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Did you say six?! That's a horrible idea! It's not
Tokyo Racecourse!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There's a lot of transfers, plus it's rush hour. Even
the smallest thing will make you late!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I guess you haven't been to Oi much.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Well don't you worry, 'cause Falco will be your guide! ☆ I'll teach you to appreciate and enjoy a race there!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Really? But don't you have your own plans
tonight?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's fiiiiine! ♪ Let me do something nice for you
every once in a while! ☆ I know the best seat in
the house! ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...She should be here soon. I'll wait for one more
minute.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Flaaash! Sorry! Sorry!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I almost blew it, but I got here just in time,
right?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: No. You're two seconds late.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Which means we need to run to Oi. That way we
can get good seats to watch the race.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: What?! R-run there?! But it was only two seconds!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash and Smart Falcon take off running
with smiles on their faces.
